title: Decree 77-92465-001
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Decree 77-92465-001''' was an amendment to the [[Imperial Charter/Legends|Imperial Charter]] passed by the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] in either [[19 BBY/Legends|19]] or [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]]. It read:

:''"All military offensives shall be considered under law as states of emergency, and subject to the [[Emergency Military Powers Act]] of the Senate."''
:

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]

[[Category:Galactic Empire laws and acts]]
